inputs.label: Initial Deposit
inputs.businessContext: The starting balance of the savings account.

businessContext_i18n.en: The starting balance of the savings account.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le solde initial du compte d'épargne.
businessContext_i18n.es: El saldo inicial de la cuenta de ahorros.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount deposited at the end of each month.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount deposited at the end of each month.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der am Ende jedes Monats eingezahlte Betrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant déposé à la fin de chaque mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad depositada al final de cada mes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ المودع في نهاية كل شهر.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate (APY)
inputs.businessContext: The annual percentage yield, representing the effective annual rate of return taking compounding into account.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annual percentage yield, representing the effective annual rate of return taking compounding into account.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşik faiz etkisini hesaba katan efektif yıllık getiri oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die jährliche Rendite, die den effektiven Jahreszins unter Berücksichtigung des Zinseszinses darstellt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le rendement annuel en pourcentage, représentant le taux de rendement effectif annuel en tenant compte de la capitalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: El rendimiento porcentual anual, que representa la tasa efectiva anual de rendimiento teniendo en cuenta la capitalización.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العائد السنوي الفعلي، يمثل معدل العائد السنوي الفعلي مع مراعاة الفائدة المركبة.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: The total number of years the money is invested.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of years the money is invested.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der Jahre, in denen das Geld angelegt ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre total d'années pendant lesquelles l'argent est investi.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número total de años que el dinero está invertido.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times interest is compounded per year. Typically 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times interest is compounded per year. Typically 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annually.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik faiz dönemi sayısı. Genellikle aylık için 12, üç aylık için 4, yıllık için 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinseszinsperioden pro Jahr. Typischerweise 12 für monatlich, 4 für vierteljährlich, 1 für jährlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de capitalisations par an. Généralement 12 pour mensuel, 4 pour trimestriel, 1 pour annuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que se capitaliza el interés por año. Normalmente 12 para mensual, 4 para trimestral, 1 para anual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مرات تركيب الفائدة سنويًا. عادة 12 للشهري، 4 للربع سنوي، 1 للسنوي.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
